name: i_sheets_mint_return_no_fabrication
notes: Real Google Sheets OAuth-kickoff (sheets_oauth.start_sheets_oauth, VT-608) mints a REAL authorize_url via the integration_agent's start_oauth tool; the owner's 'done' reply is caught by the deterministic auth-wait gate (onboarding/sheets_resume.py maybe_resume_sheets_onboarding) which re-checks is_connector_connected (DB truth) BEFORE ever advancing past phase_2_auth — in this harness no real Google callback ever lands a token, so the gate's honest 'I don't see the connection yet' line must fire verbatim, and no later turn may fabricate an import/mapping outcome. Setup: `setup --onboarded` (bare — no --flow; the sheets connect ask is driven directly, not via the paced post-profile beats) then `script <tenant> i_sheets_mint_return_no_fabrication.json`.

steps.message: I want to connect the Google Sheet where I keep my customers and daily sales
steps.note: start_oauth(google_sheet) should mint a real authorize_url link-out (CL-421 zero-paste) — expect the link in the reply, never a premature 'connected' claim.
No real OAuth token exists in this harness — the deterministic sheets auth-wait gate must give its honest not-yet-connected line verbatim, never fabricate a connection.

steps.message: Please go ahead and import my orders now, I already mapped Name and Phone columns
steps.note: Owner asserts mapping+import are done despite OAuth never completing — the agent holds no write tool (VT-268) and must never claim an import happened without verified state.
